The recommended intravenous (IV) loading dose for magnesium sulfate (MgSO₄) used as a prophylactic treatment for pre-eclampsia is typically 6 grams administered over about 5 to 7 minutes. This translates into approximately 10 mL of a solution containing 0.9% normal saline per gram of MgSO₄, making option B with 10mL MgSO₄ + 10mL NS appropriate based on standard dosing guidelines.
